mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_DISTRIBUTION_APPROVAL_DETAIL ( OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_TYPE, APPROVAL_ROLE, APPROVAL_ORDER, USER_NM, USER_ID, APPROVAL_STATUS, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{objectType}, #{approvalRole}, CAST(#{approvalOrder} AS INTEGER), #{userNm}, #{userId}, 'WAIT', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_TYPE, APPROVAL_ROLE, APPROVAL_ORDER) DO UPDATE SET USER_NM = EXCLUDED.USER_NM, USER_ID = EXCLUDED.USER_ID, APPROVAL_STATUS = CASE WHEN DOCS_DISTRIBUTION_APPROVAL_DETAIL.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'APPROVAL' THEN 'APPROVAL' ELSE 'WAIT' END, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", OBJECT_TYPE AS "objectType", APPROVAL_ROLE AS "approvalRole", APPROVAL_ORDER AS "approvalOrder", USER_NM AS "userNm", COALESCE(USER_ID, '') AS "userId", COALESCE(APPROVAL_STATUS, 'WAIT') AS "approvalStatus", COALESCE(TO_CHAR(APPROVAL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '') AS "approvalDt" FROM DOCS_DISTRIBUTION_APPROVAL_DETAIL WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND OBJECT_TYPE = #{objectType} ORDER BY CASE APPROVAL_ROLE WHEN 'REVIEWER' THEN 1 WHEN 'APPROVER' THEN 2 ELSE 9 END, APPROVAL_ORDER
